title: feat(enter): add OpenAI-compatible image generation endpoints
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: The hive speaks OpenAI
gist.blurb: You can now use the standard OpenAI SDK to generate and edit images through Pollinations. Just swap the base URL and let the pixel magic flow!
gist.summary: Added OpenAI-compatible endpoints for image generation and editing, allowing developers to use standard SDKs to create and modify images.
gist.impact: Developers can now seamlessly integrate Pollinations image generation into existing apps using the OpenAI SDK by simply changing the base URL.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a bridge/adapter. She is plugging a standard cable into a glowing lime green canvas. The Robot companion is holding an 'SDK' manual, excited about the new compatibility.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, plugging a standard cable into a glowing lime green (#ecf874) canvas that is painting a picture. A chunky retro robot companion with a monitor head holds an 'SDK' manual, screen showing happy square eyes. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
